items.title: One fun thing about catching up on FA chatter is finding myself thinking, "Why is it that, whenever I see Sandro Mamukelashvili's name, I immediately think about Flavor Flav?" And I remember it's because A) they're pals, B) I wrote about that and C) my brain's not totally gone. y
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: One fun thing about catching up on FA chatter is finding myself thinking, "Why is it that, whenever I see Sandro Mamukelashvili's name, I immediately think about Flavor Flav?"
